phase_0_aaf_resolutions.resolution: Resolved within profile cycle. Initial-capture rev 2c6924d (2026-02-21) had 24 M + 2 U representing May 21 portfolio integration. Operator-approved triage landed 3 commits (daea00d CNAME + 6eaa529 MAAT integration + ee6c7e5 profile). HEAD now ee6c7e5; working tree clean substantively. Phase 10.5 smoke-tests against ee6c7e5, eliminating snapshot/branch drift risk.

Declared-vs-enforced gap recorded as carry-forward caveat. In-repo CI declaration is complete (deploy.yml L62-74 runs quality+build on PR; deploy gated on PR=false). Whether PR-time checks are required-for-merge is governed by external GitHub branch protection rules not visible from in-repo state. Operator decision needed in remediation, not blocking the audit. SUMMARY.md will carry this caveat.

exit_check.drift_working_tree_note: Only profile yaml itself is modified (being consumed by this audit); all substantive sources clean
